profile_summary: Results-driven Computer Engineering student (CGPA: 8.72) with hands-on execution across backend systems, startup operations, and team leadership. Co-Founded a supply-chain startup incubated at CIBA Vashi (Rs.50K+ revenue); Vice President at Toastmasters, coaching 50+ students over 1.5 years in structured communication. National Hackathon Winner (1st/70+ teams, 12 states, Rs.50,000 prize) building a privacy-preserving cross-bank fraud detection system. Focused on Go-based backend development, concurrent systems, and practical system design.

experience.title: Vice President Public Relations & Former Treasurer
bullets: Coached 50+ students over 1.5 years through 1-on-1 sessions, workshops, and structured feedback rounds, helping members overcome stage fear and build technical communication skills
Edited and published 5 issues of ToastTimes magazine, distributed to all HODs and campus directors, and officially submitted to GHRCEM Nagpur for institutional recognition
Managed club finances and led PR initiatives, sustaining member engagement across a growing chapter

experience.title: Co-Founding Chief Operating Officer
bullets: Designed and operated a 3-person supply chain from Pune to Nanded, sourcing barbershop materials at 15% lower cost than local vendors and delivering to 5+ high-volume B2B customers
Drove Rs.50,000+ in early revenue by replacing unreliable local supply with a consistent, margin-efficient distribution model across a tier-3 city market

education.institute: G H Raisoni College of Engineering and Management, Pune

projects.title: SATARK
projects.impact: National Hackathon Winner – 1st place / 70+ teams / 12 states, ₹50,000 prize (Mar 2026)
bullets: Engineered a privacy-preserving fraud detection system using HMAC-based linkage and graph-based anomaly detection across 5,000+ mock RBI-structured transactions

Achieved 80% detection accuracy on mock data; architecture projects 95%+ on live datasets by surfacing multi-hop laundering patterns (cycles, smurfing, velocity anomalies) without exposing raw customer data

projects.title: ControlPlane
bullets: Built a server-rendered Go application for internal runbooks and incident documentation, exposing 20+ REST endpoints backed by a 9-table PostgreSQL schema
Implemented session management, multi-step approval workflows, and tamper-evident audit history to support structured team knowledge operations

projects.title: RedisForge
bullets: Implemented production-grade patterns across 8 Redis modules – RedisJSON, RedisBloom, RediSearch, Streams, Pub/Sub, Sentinel, Cluster, and latency profiling
Sustained 265 ops/sec with zero failures across 752 benchmarked operations; enforced idempotency via Bloom filter pre-checks with no false negatives

projects.title: ConcurFlow
bullets: Designed a bounded-concurrency URL processor with a 5-goroutine worker pool, early invalid-input filtering, structured logging, and context-aware graceful cancellation
Front-loaded validation before I/O to eliminate wasted goroutine cycles, preventing resource allocation on malformed inputs before network operations begin

awards.title: National Hackathon Winner – SATARK (Mar 2026)
awards.details: 1st place out of 70+ teams across 12 states. Awarded ₹50,000 for building a privacy-preserving cross-bank fraud detection system – 80% accuracy on RBI-structured mock data, projecting 95%+ on live datasets.
